title: 🛡️ Cyber Immune System
description: An enterprise-grade AI cybersecurity platform designed to detect, analyze, and autonomously respond to cyber threats in real time. The platform integrates machine learning, behavioral analytics, threat intelligence, deepfake detection, digital identity verification, and automated incident response to minimize attack impact.
features: Real-time SOC dashboard with intelligent risk scoring
MITRE ATT&CK mapping for threat actors
Behavioral anomaly detection using deep learning

title: 💳 FraudSim AI
description: A secure digital payment simulation platform capable of detecting fraudulent financial transactions using machine learning and behavioral analysis. It analyzes transaction velocity, geolocation mismatches, and behavioral patterns to flag suspicious activities.
features: Machine learning models trained on fraud datasets

title: 🎭 DeepShield AI
description: A multi-modal digital forensics platform engineered for detecting manipulated images, deepfake videos, and synthetic voice recordings. It provides confidence scores and highlights manipulated regions in media.
features: Synthetic voice analysis and frequency mapping

title: ✈️ Flighto Security
description: A secure ticket booking platform built with enterprise-grade controls. It implements strict Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), end-to-end encryption for sensitive data, and business logic fraud prevention.

title: 🤖 AI Internship Engine
description: An intelligent recommendation engine that matches student resumes with appropriate internship opportunities. It parses resumes, extracts key skills using Natural Language Processing, and calculates cosine similarity to job descriptions.
features: Automated resume parsing and skill extraction
TF-IDF vectorization and Cosine Similarity scoring

title: 🏫 CollERP
description: An Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) platform designed for educational institutions, built strictly on Zero Trust principles. It ensures every request is authenticated and authorized, preventing lateral movement within the application.
features: Secure JSON Web Token (JWT) stateless auth
Comprehensive audit logging for all actions
